response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman, but his background is heavily focused on full-stack web development using TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang. He lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, possessing only a brief 7-month stint with C/C++ nearly a decade ago. Furthermore, he does not have the required specialized domain expertise in Fixed Income or Capital Markets, making him unsuitable for this specific role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience with strong CI/CD and DevOps skills.
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship, including TDD and agile methodologies.
Possesses some of the optional skills requested, such as Java development and scripting languages.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of professional C++ development experience.
No demonstrated background in Windows platform development or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle.
Missing required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or Investment Banking.
